raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation of autonomy and inner authority",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "an internal compass exists and is reliable for discerning truth",
    "external agreement is unnecessary for maintaining truth",
    "clarity can be stably accessed internally without external validation"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; statements form a consistent cluster around self-reliance with no contradictions",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker's internal signals must track reality, support well-being, and not systematically exclude corrective information",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the internal compass must be distorted by bias, trauma, or delusion while the speaker treats it as infallible"
}
